name: pragmatic-growth
description: Skills-only Claude Code and Droid plugins from Pragmatic Growth, including flywheel for autonomous goal queues and html-artifacts for rich browser deliverables.

plugins.name: flywheel
plugins.description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid — define-goal, dispatch, loop-architect, and factory-doctor: turn wants into measurable goal contracts, work one ready goal per run on the current branch, design autonomous loop contracts, and preflight the environment.

plugins.name: html-artifacts
plugins.description: Create self-contained HTML plans, specs, reports, research syntheses, diagrams, timelines, dashboards, decks, prototypes, and one-off editors when markdown would flatten the work.
